name: FutuRe Europe Reinsurance
description: European reinsurance operations headquartered in Zurich

content.name: FutuRe Europe Reinsurance
content.description:
European reinsurance operations covering treaty and facultative business across EMEA markets. Headquartered in Zurich with offices in London, Paris, and Munich.

**Data Products:**
- [Local Lines of Business](/FutuRe/EuropeRe/LineOfBusiness) — 8 LoBs in EUR
- [Analysis Cube](/FutuRe/EuropeRe/Analysis/AnnualReport) — Local P&L aggregation
- [Mapping Rules](/FutuRe/EuropeRe/TransactionMapping/MappingRules) — Maps local LoBs to 10 Group LoBs

**Data Flow:** Cashflows → Lines of Business → Analysis Cube → [Transaction Mapping](/FutuRe/TransactionMapping) → Group Consolidation
